expectations.evidence: settings.json exists at outputs/settings.json with permissions and hooks configuration

expectations.text: CLAUDE.md references vite, jest, and vercel specifically (not generic React boilerplate)
expectations.evidence: Line 2: 'built with TypeScript and Vite. Deployed to Vercel.' Line 75: 'Jest with React Testing Library'. Line 84: 'Vercel' deployment section with VITE_ prefix rule. Also references vite.config, vercel.json, and Vite entry point (main.tsx).
Build & Run section (lines 7-37) includes: npm install, npm run dev, npm run build, npm run preview, npm test, npm test -- --watch, npm run lint, npm run format, npx tsc --noEmit

expectations.text: settings.json permissions include npm/npx/node but NOT Bash(*)
expectations.evidence: Permissions use scoped patterns: 'Bash(npm test *)', 'Bash(npm run *)', 'Bash(npx tsc *)', 'Bash(npx prettier *)', 'Bash(npx eslint *)', 'Bash(npx jest *)', 'Bash(npx vite *)', 'Bash(node *)'. No 'Bash(*)' present. Also includes scoped git read commands and filesystem read commands.

expectations.text: Output includes or recommends auto-format hooks (prettier/eslint)
expectations.evidence: settings.json includes three hooks: auto-format.sh (PostToolUse on Edit|Write, runs Prettier), auto-lint.sh (PostToolUse on Edit, runs ESLint), and secret-scanner.sh (PreToolUse on Write|Edit). Actual hook scripts are provided in outputs/hooks/.

expectations.text: Creates or recommends a memory directory structure
expectations.evidence: Full memory directory created at outputs/memory/ with MEMORY.md index and 4 seed memories: user_role.md, project_tech_stack.md, project_bootstrap.md, reference_deployment.md. MEMORY.md organizes entries by type (User, Feedback, Project, References).
CLAUDE.md is 99 lines, well under the 400-line limit.

notes: Excellent output. All 8 assertions pass. The with_skill variant produced a comprehensive, well-structured harness: a concise CLAUDE.md (99 lines) with stack-specific content, properly scoped permissions with wildcard patterns for flexibility, three practical hook scripts (auto-format, auto-lint, secret scanner), and a full memory directory with categorized seed memories. The summary.md demonstrates clear reasoning for each decision. This goes meaningfully beyond the baseline requirements.
